metadata.description: 11 skills for safe irreversible operations — staged delete, reversible disable, blast-radius ordering, atomic config edits, fresh-probe verification, and more. Distilled from a real 399GB production teardown.

plugins.name: safe-ops-skills
plugins.description: Skills for safely performing irreversible operations: staged delete with graveyard protocol, reversible disable primitive, blast-radius ordering, atomic config edits, fresh-probe verification, classify-before-delete, confidence gates, external recovery anchors, harness boundary awareness, executable caller checks, and Claude stock audit.
